_comment: Contact details (email, phone) are plausible placeholder-format examples for demo purposes only and must be verified before real-world use.

listings.name: Hotelbeds
listings.description: Hotelbeds operates as one of the largest B2B travel wholesalers globally, contracting hotel allotments and reselling them at net rates exclusively to travel trade partners such as tour operators, OTAs, and airlines. It never sells directly to consumers, focusing purely on B2B distribution.
usps: Pure B2B model with no direct-to-consumer conflict

listings.name: WebBeds
listings.description: WebBeds is a global B2B accommodation wholesaler under Web Travel Group, providing net-rate hotel inventory exclusively to travel agents, tour operators, and airline retailing platforms. It operates a portfolio of regional brands to serve diverse trade markets worldwide.

listings.name: TBO (Travel Boutique Online)
listings.description: TBO is a B2B travel wholesaler distributing hotel, flight, and package inventory exclusively to travel agents and resellers, with a dominant position in India and expanding reach across the Middle East and Southeast Asia. It sources content from multiple suppliers for onward wholesale.
usps: Dominant B2B wholesaler in South Asia

listings.name: Travco
listings.description: Travco operates as a B2B hotel and destination service wholesaler under DER Touristik, contracting accommodation and ground services in Egypt, Turkey, and the wider Mediterranean region for resale to European tour operators and agents.
usps: Deep Red Sea and Eastern Mediterranean expertise
Backed by DER Touristik trade network

listings.name: GRNconnect
listings.description: GRNconnect operates a wholesale hotel distribution network providing net-rate accommodation content to travel trade partners globally through API and web portal, positioning itself as an accessible bedbank alternative for smaller resellers.
usps: Lower barrier to entry for smaller trade partners

listings.name: Restel
listings.description: Restel functions as a Nordic hotel wholesaler, contracting accommodation across Europe for resale to Finnish and Baltic travel agencies, while also operating its own hotel brands as a vertically integrated trade supplier.
usps: Vertically integrated wholesaler and hotel owner

listings.name: DOTW (Destinations of the World)
listings.description: DOTW operates as a B2B hotel wholesaler and destination management company, contracting accommodation and ground services across the Middle East, Africa, and Asia for exclusive resale to travel trade partners worldwide.
usps: Combined wholesale bedbank and DMC model

listings.name: MTS Globe
listings.description: MTS Globe is a destination management company and B2B wholesaler operating across the Balkans, Eastern Mediterranean, and Middle East, providing hotel, transfer, and excursion inventory exclusively to international tour operators and travel agents.
usps: Deep regional DMC expertise across Balkans/Mediterranean
Trusted by major European tour operators

listings.name: Jonview Canada
listings.description: Jonview Canada is a destination management company and wholesaler specializing in inbound travel to Canada, providing hotel, tour, and transportation packages exclusively to international tour operators and travel agents selling Canadian itineraries.
usps: Leading specialist in inbound Canadian travel
Part of TUI Group's destination management arm

listings.name: Miki Travel
listings.description: Miki Travel operates as a global B2B hotel wholesaler and ground handling network, contracting accommodation and destination services worldwide for exclusive resale to tour operators, with especially deep roots serving Japanese and Asian outbound trade.
usps: Deep expertise serving Asian outbound trade

listings.name: Global Vision Travel Group
listings.description: Global Vision Travel is a receptive tour operator and B2B wholesaler managing group inbound travel programs across North America, the Caribbean, and Europe for international tour operator clients, handling hotel contracting and ground logistics.
usps: Specialist receptive operator for group travel

listings.name: Discover the World
listings.description: Discover the World is a UK-based representation and wholesale distribution company that acts as the trade sales arm for numerous international tourism boards, cruise lines, and hotel groups, connecting them to travel agents and tour operators in source markets.

listings.name: Bonotel Exclusive Travel
listings.description: Bonotel Exclusive Travel operates as a B2B luxury hotel wholesaler, contracting premium and boutique hotel allotments in leisure destinations like the Caribbean and Mexico for exclusive resale to travel agents and tour operators.

listings.name: Gullivers Travel Associates (GTA)
listings.description: Gullivers Travel Associates, now integrated into WebBeds' brand portfolio, historically operated as a standalone global hotel wholesaler contracting accommodation for resale exclusively to travel trade partners across leisure and MICE segments.
usps: Now backed by WebBeds' distribution scale

listings.name: Kuoni Tumlare
listings.description: Kuoni Tumlare is a global destination management and B2B wholesale services company operating across Asia, Europe, and the Americas, providing hotel contracting, ground handling, and MICE program support exclusively to tour operators and travel agencies.
usps: Deep MICE and group program expertise

listings.name: Anex Tour
listings.description: Anex Tour is a European tour operator and B2B wholesaler contracting large-scale hotel allotments in Turkey, Egypt, the UAE, and Southern Europe for resale to travel agencies primarily serving CIS and Eastern European outbound markets.
usps: Dominant wholesale player in CIS outbound market
Large-scale charter and hotel allotment contracts
